parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-5', max_tokens: 2000, system: `You are the Angel Precision Content Agent. Turn real trading operations data into daily content for LinkedIn and X. Brand: institutional-style automated options execution. Tone: calm, technical, founder-led, transparent, never scammy. Never guarantee returns or promise passive income. Always emphasize monitored execution, risk controls, operational visibility. Return valid JSON only, no markdown.`, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `Today is ${$json.today} (${$json.day_of_week}). Week stats: ${$json.week_trades} trades, ${$json.week_win_rate}% win rate, avg ${$json.week_avg_pnl}% per trade. Recent: ${$json.recent_trades_summary}. Generate content for today. Return JSON: { "linkedin_morning": "", "linkedin_afternoon": "", "x_morning": "", "x_afternoon": "", "theme": "", "approval_required": true }` }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ linkedin_morning: $json.linkedin_morning, linkedin_afternoon: $json.linkedin_afternoon, x_morning: $json.x_morning, x_afternoon: $json.x_afternoon, theme: $json.theme, generated_at: $json.generated_at, status: 'PENDING_APPROVAL', approval_required: true }) }}
